    安全设置

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int GLOVEBOX_LOCK
      Deprecated. 
      use android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#GLOVE_BOX_LOCKED instead. --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int PARKING_AUTO_UNLOCK
      Automatic parking unlock 驻车自动解锁，原ID：SETTING_FUNC_P_GEAR_UNLOCK ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 10:45:30
      static int PRIVATE_LOCK
      to activate/deactivate private locking functionality<br>Original AdaptAPI：SETTING_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK 开启或关闭 私人锁<br>原AdaptAPI：SETTING_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-09 15:49:51
      static int PRIVATE_LOCK_ACCESS_PASSWORD
      [v446k private]private lock access password<br>Original AdaptAPI:BCM_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_ACCESS_PASSWORD.
      static int PRIVATE_LOCK_CHECK_NFC
      check the valid NFC card<br>Original AdaptAPI：KEY_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_CHECK_NFC 检测有效NFC卡<br>V216新增私密锁清除密码使用两张NFC卡方案，平移V446K。原AdaptAPI：KEY_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_CHECK_NFC ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE ISafety.NfcCarCheckState property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-09 14:03:05
      static int PRIVATE_LOCK_REMINDER
      a reminder when the user tries to open the glove box or trunk when the function PRIVATE_LOCK is active<br><br>Original AdaptAPI:SETTING_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_REMINDER 手套箱打开提醒<br>原 AdaptAPI:SETTING_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_REMINDER ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE ISafety.PrivateLockReminder property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-09 16:19:58
      static int TWOSTEP_UNLOCKING
      Two step unlock switch, press the unlock button to unlock the driver's door first, and press the unlock button again to unlock the entire vehicle 两步解锁开关，开启后按解锁键先解锁主驾车门，再次按解锁键才解锁全车，原ID：SETTING_FUNC_TWOSTEP_UNLOCKING ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 11:24:00

    • Field Detail

      • GLOVEBOX_LOCK

        @Deprecated
static final int GLOVEBOX_LOCK
        Deprecated. use android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#GLOVE_BOX_LOCKED instead. --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
        Open the glove box password lock 打开手套箱密码锁，原ID：SETTING FUNC_GLOVEBOX_LOCK
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL

      • TWOSTEP_UNLOCKING

        static final int TWOSTEP_UNLOCKING
        Two step unlock switch, press the unlock button to unlock the driver's door first, and press the unlock button again to unlock the entire vehicle 两步解锁开关，开启后按解锁键先解锁主驾车门，再次按解锁键才解锁全车，原ID：SETTING_FUNC_TWOSTEP_UNLOCKING
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Boolean property type
        hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 11:24:00

      • PRIVATE_LOCK_CHECK_NFC

        static final int PRIVATE_LOCK_CHECK_NFC
        check the valid NFC card<br>Original AdaptAPI：KEY_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_CHECK_NFC 检测有效NFC卡<br>V216新增私密锁清除密码使用两张NFC卡方案，平移V446K。原AdaptAPI：KEY_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_CHECK_NFC

        static final int PRIVATE_LOCK
        to activate/deactivate private locking functionality<br>Original AdaptAPI：SETTING_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK 开启或关闭 私人锁<br>原AdaptAPI：SETTING_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK

      • PRIVATE_LOCK_ACCESS_PASSWORD

        static final int PRIVATE_LOCK_ACCESS_PASSWORD
        [v446k private]private lock access password<br>Original AdaptAPI:BCM_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_ACCESS_PASSWORD. [v446k 私有]私密锁密码存取<br>密码应加密后存储（如：MD5 SHA256等），APP将密码明文加密后与存储的加密后的密码做比较。新项目方案应考虑使用TEE相关接口<br>Original AdaptAPI:BCM_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_ACCESS_PASSWORD.
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • String property type
        deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-09 16:03:36
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • PRIVATE_LOCK_REMINDER

        static final int PRIVATE_LOCK_REMINDER
        a reminder when the user tries to open the glove box or trunk when the function PRIVATE_LOCK is active<br><br>Original AdaptAPI:SETTING_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_REMINDER 手套箱打开提醒<br>原 AdaptAPI:SETTING_FUNC_PRIVATE_LOCK_REMINDER
